name: carbondoomsday.com
prose:
# CarbonDoomsDay API

A real-time RESTish web API for worldwide carbon dioxide levels.

## Getting started

The CarbonDoomsDay API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.carbondoomsday.com/api`.

## Authentication

This API uses HTTP Basic authentication — supply your username and password with each request.

## API reference

### GET /co2/
CO2 measurements from the Mauna Loa observatory. This data is made available through the good work of the people at the Mauna Loa observatory. Their release notes say: These data a
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `ppm`, `date`, `date__range`, `ordering`, `page`, `limit`.

Sample response:

```json
{ "results": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] }
```

### GET /co2/{date}/
CO2 measurements from the Mauna Loa observatory. This data is made available through the good work of the people at the Mauna Loa observatory. Their release notes say: These data a
Returns a single record.
